atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 theme directive for defining design tokens.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive for defining custom variants.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive for registering additional content sources.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive for defining custom utilities.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive for applying variants in CSS.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 directive for importing theme data for reference.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS compatibility directive for loading legacy plugins.

atDirectives.name: @view-transition
atDirectives.description: CSS View Transitions at-rule for navigation and root transitions.

pseudoClasses.name: :active-view-transition-type
pseudoClasses.description: Matches an active view transition by its transition type.

pseudoElements.name: ::view-transition-group
pseudoElements.description: Targets a view transition group pseudo-element.

pseudoElements.name: ::view-transition-old
pseudoElements.description: Targets the old-state view transition pseudo-element.

pseudoElements.name: ::view-transition-new
pseudoElements.description: Targets the new-state view transition pseudo-element.
